label: Gas prices for non-household consumers - bi-annual data (from 2007 onwards)

label.GJ_LT1000: Consumption less than 1 000 GJ - band I1
label.GJ1000-9999: Consumption from 1 000 GJ to 9 999 GJ -band I2
label.GJ10000-99999: Consumption from 10 000 GJ to 99 999 GJ - band I3
label.GJ100000-999999: Consumption from 100 000 GJ to 999 999 GJ - band I4
label.GJ1000000-3999999: Consumption from 1 000 000 GJ to 3 999 999 GJ - band I5
label.GJ_GE4000000: Consumption 4 000 000 GJ or over - band I6

label.X_VAT: Excluding VAT and other recoverable taxes and levies
